question:
Vumpuses are liquid. Vumpuses are rompuses. Every rompus is fruity. Each rompus is a zumpus. Every zumpus is bright. Zumpuses are tumpuses. Each tumpus is happy. Each tumpus is a jompus. Jompuses are large. Every jompus is an impus. Impuses are cold. Impuses are dumpuses. Dumpuses are angry. Each dumpus is a yumpus. Each yumpus is not orange. Every wumpus is not angry. Yumpuses are numpuses. Rex is a zumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Rex is not angry.
